gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer found test stability and README completeness issues; both were fixed, re-reviewed, and approved.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Repository hygiene sidecars now record dirty tracked paths.
Release-bundle validation rejects repository hygiene sidecars unless dirty_tracked_paths is empty.
why: Release handoffs should prove they were produced from a clean tracked worktree, not just from a repo without forbidden tracked artifacts.
